vehicleManufacturerSparePartNumber.comment: Ordered Part Number - This value shall contain the number of the part ordered by OEM

systemSupplierIdentifier.comment: Name and address information of the supplier.

vehicleManufacturerKitAssemblyPartNumber.comment: Ordered Part Number - This value shall contain the number of the part ordered by OEM.

Yaw angle.comment: for calibration (Value between -4 and 8° with a resolution of 0.0001)

SessionName.comment: Diagnostic session values. See documentation for more information.

DTCFormatIdentifier.comment: DTC format - Renault/Nissan use value 0 (3 bytes DTC)

lists.0: Device and failure type ODB codding
lists.20: circuit short to ground or open
lists.21: circuit short to battery or open
lists.38: signal rate of change below threshold
lists.39: signal rate of change above threshold
lists.40: signal bias level out of range / zero adj. failure
lists.101: signal has too few transitions / events
lists.102: signal has too many transitions / events
lists.130: alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
lists.131: value of signal protection calculation incorrect
lists.151: Component or sys. operation obstructed or blocked

RoutineControlType.comment: Routine control type - VALUES OTHER THAN 1, 2 & 3 ARE RESERVED AND SHOULD NOT BE USED.

Region.comment: Value between 0 and 255 with a resolution of 1 (fix coded)

Vehicle width.comment: Value between 0 and 4000 mm with a resolution of 1

Windshield type.comment: Value between 0 and 2 with a resolution of 1 (fix coded)

Headlamps type.comment: Value between 0 and 2 with a resolution of 1

Vehicle type.comment: Value between 0 and 5 with a resolution of 1

Mode Debugger.comment: This mode allows you to recover all the results of calculate of the algorithm to make the validation

Pedestrain Present Not Present.comment: Activation or not of Pedestrain function

Supply voltage.comment: Value between 6 and 18 with a resolution of 0.1

LDW push button state.comment: Value between 0 and 1 with a resolution of 1 (fix coded)

LDW Present Not Present.comment: Activation or not of  LDW function

AHL Present Not Present.comment: Activation or not of AHL function

DW Present Not Present.comment: Activation or not of DW function.

ECU internal temperature.comment: Value between -40 and 110 °C with a resolution of 2

Steering wheel angle.comment: Value between -3276 and 3276 with a resolution of 1

lists.1: Left target contrast warning : check the lighting or cleaning the target, if it does not work change targets.
lists.2: Right target contrast warning : check the lighting or cleaning the target, if it does not work change targets.
lists.3: Right/Left target contrast warning : check the lighting or cleaning the target, if it does not work change targets.
lists.4: Left target position warning (too high)  : check the position of the target or check the installation of the camera.
lists.8: Left target position warning (too low)  : check the position of the target or check the installation of the camera.
lists.12: left target position warning high/low  :check the position of the target or check the installation of the camera.
lists.16: Left target position warning (too much left)  : check the position of the target or check the installation of the camera.
lists.22: Left target position warning (too high) and Right target contrast warning and Left target position warning (too much left) : check the position of the target or check the installation of the camera and check the lighting or cleaning the target, if it does not work change targets.
lists.32: Left target position warning (too much right)  : check the position of the target or check the installation of the camera.
lists.64: Right target position warning (too high) : check the position of the target or check the installation of the camera.
lists.128: Right target position warning (too low) : check the position of the target or check the installation of the camera.
lists.136: Left target position warning (too low) and Right target position warning (too low) : check the position of the target or check the installation of the camera.
lists.192: Right target position warning high/low : check the position of the target or check the installation of the camera.
lists.256: Right target position warning (too much left) : check the position of the target or check the installation of the camera.
lists.512: Right target position warning (too much right) : check the position of the target or check the installation of the camera.
lists.768: Right target position warning left/right : check the position of the target or check the installation of the camera.
lists.1024: Max roll range warning (forward looking clockwise) : check the installation of the camera
lists.2048: Max roll range warning (forward looking counterclockwise) : check the installation of the camera
lists.3072: Max roll range warning clockwise/counterclockwise : check the installation of the camera
lists.4096: Max yaw range warning (top view clockwise) [CURRENTLY UNUSED] (Bit No 12)
lists.8192: Max yaw range warning (top view counterclockwise) [CURRENTLY UNUSED] (Bit No 13)
lists.12288: Max yaw range warning clockwise/counterclockwise : check the installation of the camera
lists.16384: Max pitch range warning (looking too far up) [CURRENTLY UNUSED] (Bit No 14)
lists.32768: Max pitch range warning (looking too far down) [CURRENTLY UNUSED] (Bit No 15)
lists.49152: Max pitchl range warning up/down : check the installation of the camera

Warning info for calibration.comment: Reason for failure of the calibration

X_offset after calibration.comment: Value between 170 and 190mpix with a resolution of 0.001 (for calibration)

Pitch angle after calibration.comment: Value between -4 and 8° with a resolution of 0.0001

Pitch angle default value.comment: Value between -4 and 8° with a resolution of 0.001

Camera position from the ground.Z positi.comment: Value between 0 and 30000mm with a resolution of 1

Distance of target from front axle cente.comment: Value between 0 and 80000 with a resolution of 1

Height of the center of target from the.comment: Value between 0 and 30000 mm with a resolution of 1

LDW activate or not activate.comment: Enable or disable the LDW function

lists.0: OSP-Speed Limiter HMI Not activated (SpeedLimiterOSPDisplayRequest forced to 0)

OSP Speed Limiter HMI.comment: Enable or disable the display of OSP speed limiter HMI

LDW MIN SPEED ACTIV INF.comment: Value between 0 and 200Km/h with a resolution of 1

LDW MIN SPEED ACTIV SUP.comment: Value between 0 and 200Km/h with a resolution of 1

LDW MIN RADIUS ACTIV.comment: Value between 0 and 65535m with a resolution of 1

Roll angle after calibration.comment: Value between -3 and 3 ° with a resolution of 0.001 (for calibration)

Distance between target logos.comment: specific parameter for plant setup 65535mm with the resolution of 1

OSP TSR Present Not Present.comment: Activation or not of OSP function.

Error info for calibration.comment: Reason for failure of the calibration

OSP NAV SPEED SELECTION.comment: For OSP function : configuration to use or not of "non-verified" speed limits from the navigation

OSP TSR Mode.comment: For OSP/TSR function : function gives in this DID its current status whether it receives data from n

lists.0: The car is not equipped with switch of LDW function
lists.1: The car is equipped with the switch of LDW function

Presence Of the switch of LDW.comment: Verify the presence of the switch of LDW function.

Tolerance of height from Z.comment: Value between -256 and 256 mm with a resolution of 2

Camera position in the vehicle.X positio.comment: Value between -32768 mm and 32767 mm with a resolution of 1

Camera position in the vehicle.Y positio.comment: Value between -32768 mm and 32767 mm with a resolution of 1
